creator: adsouza@math.uwaterloo.ca
text:
When I try to login using a valid username/pwd combo, Gabber proceeds to stop responding.
This is the output on the console:

bash-2.04$ gabber

Gdk-WARNING **: shmget failed!
gabber 0.7.0
20010201T04:56:55<<< <stream:stream to='
20010201T04:56:55<<< jabber.com
20010201T04:56:55<<< ' xmlns='jabber:client' xmlns:stream='http://etherx.jabber.org/streams'>
20010201T04:56:55>>> <?xml version='1.0'?><stream:stream xmlns:stream='http://etherx.jabber.org/streams' id='3A78EC55' xmlns='jabber:client' from='jabber.com'>
20010201T04:56:55<<< <iq id='0' type='set'><query xmlns='jabber:iq:auth'><username>quikchange</username><resource>Home</resource><digest>efe51dd9e457686b368768d45c558b1e61652f0a</digest></query></iq>
20010201T04:56:55>>> <iq id='0' type='result'/>
20010201T04:56:55<<< <iq type='get' id='
20010201T04:56:55<<< 1
20010201T04:56:55<<< '><query xmlns='jabber:iq:agents'/></iq>
